chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.S–563 of 2025 ( Mst. Khairan v. Government of Sindh & Others ) ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 to 4 & reply as at Á 2. For hearing of main case 23-07-2025 M/s. Tariq Mehmood Siddiqui, Shakira Tariq, Adeela Ansari, Anusha Tariq and Farhan Ahmed Khanzada, Advocates for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner (Mst. Khairan) and her daughter / Injured (Soomri) Mr. K.A. Waswani, AAG Syed Zahoor Shah, APG Ms. Aleena Rajpar, SSP Sujawal DSP Raza Mian CPO Legal-II Karachi PI Muhammad Nawaz of PS Mura Bola Khan SIP Mushtaq Ahmed of PS Jatti --------------- On 23.07.2025, this Court had passed an order required the presence of SSP Sujawal as the Reports filed by SHO of police station Jatti and SSP Sujawal were not supporting to each other and were contradicting the stance taken by both officers. Today, SSP Sujawal namely Ms. Aleena Rajpar has effected appearance and filed statement that FIR No.98 of 2025 at police station Jatti for offence under Section 324, 452, 337-Fv, 506/2, 509, 147, 148, 149, PPC has been recorded as per verbatim of Petitioner and the investigation of the case is with SIP Mushtaq Ahmed Barahmani of police station Jatti. SSP Sujawal further undertakes that the investigation of the case shall be undertaken fairly and honestly and she will ensure that no innocent person faces criminal charges pursuant to the FIR recorded by the Petitioner. She also undertakes that the investigation of the FIR may be assigned to honest and efficient officer.

SSP Sujawal further undertakes that the investigation of the case shall be undertaken fairly and honestly and she will ensure that no innocent person faces criminal charges pursuant to the FIR recorded by the Petitioner. She also undertakes that the investigation of the FIR may be assigned to honest and efficient officer. She may do the needful as per law. Petitioner submits that she and her family are facing imminent danger to their lives at the hands of the accused persons nominated in FIR and they are unable to reside in their home situated in the village Akber Bakho near Jatti. SSP, present in Court, submits that she will ensure that the Petitioner and her family are settled at their native place without any hindrance and she further ensures that no harm will be caused to them and in case, they face any difficulty in settlement at 2 their native village, she will take immediate action against the perpetrators. This is a case of severe hardship wherein foot of one lady Ms. Soomri was badly damaged due to injuries caused by the accused persons in the month of June 2025 and it is also very sad state of affairs that injured could not get medical treatment at her home district on account of apprehension to her life at the hands of the private persons nominated in the FIR. She left no stone unturned, but police of the concerned police station did not come forward for providing her due protection in accordance with law. It could only happen wherein this Court took cognizance of the matter and on notice SHO of police station Jatti appeared and filed evasive statement, which corroborated the stance of the Petitioner that the local police comes in connivance with accused seeking immigration of the Petitioner and her family from their native village. This performance on the part of police of the concerned police station cannot be let go unchecked because police are settled with the responsibilities to protect the lives of the citizens and under no cost they can be absolved of their duties to be performed in accordance with law.

It could only happen wherein this Court took cognizance of the matter and on notice SHO of police station Jatti appeared and filed evasive statement, which corroborated the stance of the Petitioner that the local police comes in connivance with accused seeking immigration of the Petitioner and her family from their native village. This performance on the part of police of the concerned police station cannot be let go unchecked because police are settled with the responsibilities to protect the lives of the citizens and under no cost they can be absolved of their duties to be performed in accordance with law. SSP Sujawal, present in Court, submits that she will look into the matter personally and investigate the reasons as to why due protection of law could not be provided to the Petitioner and her complaint was not recorded within time. Apparently, due to non- recording of the statement of the Petitioner in time, the accused may get the benefit of the same when trial commenced. SSP Sujawal may do the needful under the police Act and Rules framed therein. Since the Petitioner has shown serious apprehension to her life and it is apparent from the record that since 29.06.2025, Petitioner and her family are residing in Karachi having in house of relatives. SSP Sujawal shall depute a responsible officer today, who will ensure that the Petitioner safely reached to her destination and reside over there without any fear from any side. SHO concerned shall ensure that no harm is caused to the Petitioner and her family. In case, any harm is caused to the Petitioner, SHO concerned shall also be held responsible for the same. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE FAIZAN/
